title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Power Grid Corporation

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Power Grid Corporation
jsonLd.description:
Power Grid Corporation is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Power Grid Corporation:
Power Grid Corporation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Power Grid Corporation!
